transcript.text:
Hello,
My name is Hwang In Young, the donator/supporter for Shim Kyu Hun for about 10 years
[Shim Kyu Hun]
[She knows all about him] He wanted to be a public official worker or a police officer at first
Realistically, we are complete strangers
We've never met, but she helped me through those years
I want to show her that I've grown up well
A high school student from Ulsan has discovered clusters of stars, nearly 209 of them which we have never seen before
Our country and also the world is paying close attention to this
I really want to see him
Rather than just going there
I'm over here Yes
[So thankful for the past 10 years] [I really want to see you]
Hello
Was she not able to come?
[This video was made with Hopeful Friend Food for the Hungry and Mom's Touch]

Hello everyone
I'm on my way to meet someone incredible
He is one of South Korea's less than 1%
He said he's here at the playground Where is he?
[Looking for the student]
I see a student there
Excuse me,
Are you Shim Kyu Hun?
Hello
Are you that very smart person? The genius?
Hello, I am Shim Kyu Hun and I'm 21 years old
I'm currently attending KAIST, school of electrical and electronic engineering
I started receiving financial support from Food for the Hungry since I was very young
I remember it was maybe 2nd or 3rd grade in elementary
KAIST, right? Is that right?
[So smart] That's so cool

[Real genius vs Mukbang genius] My friends insisted I should wear this
I heard that you have a story to tell
Do you mind if we talk about it while we eat? I'm hungry
I'd love that
[Mom's Touch 'Cheeseholic Burger']
So good
So what year are you? 2nd year
Have you done blind dates?
Yes, just once
How did that go?
We never talked since
You've never done mukbang, right? Yes
Do you want to give it a try?
I'm here eating Mom's Touch
The Cheeseholic Burger
It's tasty Mm~ yummy~

[Studying is the easiest]
Now that's a professional
[I got it now]
You have a huge mouth
You're good at eating
I normally finish the burger when people are at half
You ate that pretty quickly
I heard that you went through some tough times
My family was not in a good situation at the time
My father had an antique shop
As for my mother..
Both of my parents did not have a stable income So I had no support from either of them
I can't put it into words, but
Receiving support was embarrassing for some reason The clothes that I wore never felt like it was mine
I can openly say it now about this topic
Telling my friends that I received financial support since I was young

Mainly because I've grown up to be a good man now
That's why I can proudly say what I went through But at the time, it was very hard
At a young age, it was very difficult to accept the fact that I didn't have what other kids had
How did you become so smart?
You usually go to college/university with grades
But for KAIST, there's a special selection
To research new things
Or even if you're good at programming
Anyone can apply for that special program
When I was in high school, I researched a lot about astronomy
I wrote a paper on it
And found a new cluster of stars
And solely because I found that
A high school student from Ulsan has discovered clusters of stars, nearly 209 of them which we have never seen before
Our country and also the world is paying close attention to this
[All thanks to the donator's support]

[He has become the man he is now]
There is a person out there that's not my family Who is praying for me and supporting me
There's a person sacrificing to financially support me
So I have to live extra hard
I want to proudly show that person that I have grown up well With no shame
It was what got me through the hard times All thanks to that person
And that motivated me more to work harder
I'm not sure if I can make it happen,
But now that I know your story, I will make efforts to try to find you your supporter
But since it's private information and due to privacy
The person not might want to be on the internet
How about a video message for the supporter?
I'm choking up
Hello,
I'm not sure if you've seen my face before,
I'm Shim Kyu Hun You have been supporting me for such a long time

I'm still choking
Hopefully, you get to see this message I really want to meet you in person
If not,
I'm just grateful to have relayed this message of thankfulness to you
Thank you
[We look forward to a meeting that's been overdue for 10 years]
So after talking with him, I found out that the donator is from Food for the Hungry
So I'm here to look for that person
Let's head inside
Hello
I'm here to look for a donator
The person receiving support is Shim Kyu Hun
It's this person
I will call that person to see if they're okay with releasing their information to you
[Waiting on their call]
She is willing to give you her information

Thank you
Thank you
I really want them to meet I'll see what I can do
[On the way to meet her]
Hello?
Hello, are you the donator for Shim Kyu Hun?
Ms. Hwang In young?
I got your information from Food for the Hungry Can we meet, please?
Of course, I've been waiting for you
Thank you, I'll head inside then
Yes, thank you
[Finally getting to meet the supporter]
Nice to meet you
Can we film in here? Yes you can
Thank you
Hello, my name is Hwang In Young, the donator/supporter for Shim Kyu Hun for about 10 years

I have photos of the kids that I financially support
[The photos are beside the bed to pray for them every night]
You're so amazing
Around when did you start supporting Shim Kyu Hun?
Around when he was 11 years old
So it's been almost 10 years
He was financially struggling
According to the social worker, there was a letter saying that he was too cold to live through the Winter days
So I always think about him when it's Winter
[He's grown up to be a good man thanks to you]
He looks exactly the same!
You've never met him before, right? Yes
I've been really careful
I've donated money to orphanages before
These kids are very sensitive to relationships and
Often confused on when and how they can bond with their supporters

So I just wanted to be extra careful with this matter
I'm able to donate more on special occasions like Christmas and Birthdays So I did that instead
I really want to meet him
[A video message for her]
[I really want to see you]
A heart of thankfulness before anything
Secondly,
I don't know if this is the correct way to say it but,
I want to brag
I want to show and tell the world that it was all thanks to her
Hello
Hi, this is Tzuyang Yes, hello
I'm here in front of the building
[Was she able to come here with Tzuyang?]
Hello
Was she not able to come?

[A meeting after 10 years]
Can I call your name?
Is this for me? Yes
I didn't think you would come today
There's a letter here too
You've grown up so well
Can I talk freely? Yes
This doesn't feel real
Come give me a hug, Kyu Hun
[We hope/pray for Hwang In Young and Shim Kyu Hun's happiness]
Please read it alone I'm too shy
Please read it aloud for us
[Embarrassed]
Hello
It's been a while
I'm Shim Kyu Hun, the one you've been supporting for many years

We've known each other for almost 10 years through Food for the Hungry
The grace that I've received from you
It remains in my life so precious that cannot be converted into anything else
I too wanted to share the love and grace that I've received
So I went to Food for the Hungry last August to start an alliance with a high school student
I would truly be happy if I can remain as a person just like you've supported me
And if at least one more person can share the good influence that began and started with you
Lastly, thank you as always I wish you peace in your home
2021. 4. 28. Shim Kyu Hun
I've always thought to myself: 'I'll go see him when he's grown up or when he's in college'
But I never thought I'd get a chance like this
I'm so happy
[We wish your future days will be full of hope]
Mom's Touch donated 500,000,000 Won to Food for the Hungry to take part in doing good deeds
Also sent out their burgers to foster homes/orphanages and kids that are receiving support
We will deliver them ourselves

[Food for the Hungry X Mom's Touch] [Deliverying meals to locals that are receiving financial support]
A burger is really not that much, but the kids will certainly enjoy it
Now we're at the orphanage to deliver 75 burgers
Hello
We would usually go out to eat,
But we are really restricted right now because of Covid
We're so happy that we received burgers because the kids love it
You've helped us last time (Christmas video) And this time too. Thank you so much
[Hopeful Friend Food for the Hungry X Mom's Touch X Tzuyang] We hope that the kids enjoyed the meal :)
Today was a day I will never forget
I want our society to be wholesome Thank you for making this happen
I strive to become a person like you
You have become a donator/supporter already
I want to become one as well
I'm so proud
[Tzuyang signing up to financially support a person]

[With you, the world is one step closer to abundance] [Thank you to all the supporters who share their warm love with the world today]
[Thank you to all the personnel who cooperated with filming, and thank you to Hopeful Friend Food for the Hungry and Mom's Touch] [Subtitles by Hyun Choi] [antharoni@gmail.com]
